components.name: TopBar
components.ui_role: Global command/navigation bar and destructive tools entry point.
implementation_notes: Fact: Owns view switching and top-level turn controls.
Fact: Houses export/import/wipe/reset commands.
ui_ux_risks: Critical controls may become hidden if over-compressed.
Contains destructive actions requiring clear confirmation.

components.name: MainDisplay
components.ui_role: Routes between list and map content surfaces.
implementation_notes: Fact: Uses `view === 'map'` to swap full map vs list stack.
Inferred: Good shell for medium-screen fallback behavior.
ui_ux_risks: Inline alert duplication with TopBar alert concepts may confuse hierarchy.

components.name: BattlemasterLayout
components.ui_role: Map-first tri-panel live combat workspace.
implementation_notes: Fact: Independent panel drag widths with global mouse listeners.
Fact: Auto-collapse thresholds set only on initial mount.
ui_ux_risks: Drag resize logic is fragile if refactored to naive local handlers.

components.name: BattlemasterQuickActions
components.ui_role: Fast chip-based active-target damage/heal control.
implementation_notes: Fact: Hidden when no active entity.
Fact: Damage type hardcoded to `Untyped`.
ui_ux_risks: Multiple damage entry points may cause operator inconsistency.

components.name: NowActingPanel
components.ui_role: Focused active-turn command panel.
implementation_notes: Fact: Computes bloodied/dead and displays legendary controls inline.
Fact: Has own advance-turn button and spacebar hint alignment.
ui_ux_risks: If visually minimized too aggressively, live combat flow slows.

components.name: InitiativeLedger
components.ui_role: Reorderable turn roster and unit-level operations hub.
implementation_notes: Fact: Uses Framer `Reorder.Group` for initiative drag reorder.
Fact: Owns GroupDamageSheet open state.
ui_ux_risks: Reorder behavior and turnIndex recalculation must remain consistent.

components.name: EntityCard
components.ui_role: Tactical unit card orchestrator for compact and full detail modes.
implementation_notes: Fact: Compact mode and full mode are both implemented in-file.
Inferred: Candidate for decomposition if complexity keeps growing.
ui_ux_risks: High coupling to many subcomponents and callbacks.

components.name: EntityHP
components.ui_role: HP bar and quick damage/healing interface for one entity.
implementation_notes: Fact: Includes preview HP ghost and 1/2 or 2x mutators.
Fact: Group toggle shown when `groupId` exists.
ui_ux_risks: Another duplicate damage control surface.

components.name: EntityStats
components.ui_role: Entity identity and core stat editors including initiative and visibility.
implementation_notes: Fact: Initiative drag handle is embedded in this section.
Fact: Name/ac/maxHp/tempHp/dc are directly editable inputs.
ui_ux_risks: Inline edits can be accident-prone without stronger focus states.

components.name: EntityConditions
components.ui_role: Condition and concentration management area.
implementation_notes: Fact: Toggles concentration flag and condition list updates.
Fact: Displays active timed effects if present.
ui_ux_risks: Condition density can overflow in compact layouts.

components.name: EntityActions
components.ui_role: Embeds tactical damage calculator for per-entity transactions.
implementation_notes: Fact: DamageCalculator callbacks are wrapped from EntityCard context.
ui_ux_risks: Adds another damage entry route.

components.name: EntityLegendaryResources
components.ui_role: Legendary/lair resource tracker and entity maintenance actions.
implementation_notes: Fact: Includes hasLairAction toggle and clone/purge actions.
ui_ux_risks: Destructive purge button sits near non-destructive controls.

components.name: EntityReference
components.ui_role: Inline monster stat/trait/action reference block.
implementation_notes: Fact: Read-only reference panel controlled by EntityCard state.
ui_ux_risks: Long text blocks can push card height heavily.

components.name: MapDisplay
components.ui_role: Tactical map engine, toolbar, palette, and token interaction surface.
implementation_notes: Fact: Canvas + DOM token hybrid with shared transform wrapper.
Fact: Pan/zoom are skipHistory operations; most content edits are undoable.
ui_ux_risks: Monolithic file with high behavior coupling.
Token drag alignment and history semantics are easy to regress.

components.name: ActionLedger
components.ui_role: Chronological combat/action log with filter categories.
implementation_notes: Fact: Groups logs by round and decorates using `type/subType`.
ui_ux_risks: Icon semantics depend on message/subType conventions.

components.name: TacticalAlertStack
components.ui_role: Actionable top-level concentration and warning alert resolver.
implementation_notes: Fact: Concentration alerts expose pass/fail actions directly.
ui_ux_risks: If moved out of top-level context, critical saves may be missed.

components.name: BestiaryDrawer
components.ui_role: Slide-out bestiary selector variant.
implementation_notes: Fact: Not mounted by current App modal flow.
Inferred: Legacy/alternate UI retained in repo.
ui_ux_risks: Dead/parallel UI path can drift from primary bestiary behavior.

components.name: BestiaryModal
components.ui_role: Primary mounted bestiary modal for monster deployment.
implementation_notes: Fact: Searchable list + detailed selected monster panel.
ui_ux_risks: Large detail area can be heavy on smaller widths.

components.name: RulesPanel
components.ui_role: Rules reference and combat ledger drawer.
implementation_notes: Fact: Local `RULES_DATABASE` powers searchable rules library.
ui_ux_risks: Rules data is static in component file, not externalized.

components.name: SnapshotDrawer
components.ui_role: Snapshot archive management UI.
implementation_notes: Fact: Shows unit count and round metadata per snapshot.
ui_ux_risks: Restore/delete are high impact actions that require clear affordance.

components.name: DamageCalculator
components.ui_role: Damage math helper including save and resistance/vulnerability modifiers.
implementation_notes: Fact: Uses `calculateFinalDamage` utility for previewed final amount.
ui_ux_risks: Multiple damage UIs may diverge in behavior expectations.

components.name: GroupDamageSheet
components.ui_role: Atomic multi-target area damage transaction panel.
implementation_notes: Fact: Builds `damageMap` and applies once to preserve batch semantics.
ui_ux_risks: Changing ownership may break tactical sequence flow and discoverability.

components.name: CommandPalette
components.ui_role: Keyboard-first command launcher across actions, monsters, and rules.
implementation_notes: Fact: Integrates rules and bestiary search into one surface.
ui_ux_risks: Keyboard handlers rely on global listener and result index validity.

components.name: ConditionPalette
components.ui_role: Reusable condition toggle grid.
implementation_notes: Fact: Uses `CONDITIONS` and icon metadata from combat utils.
ui_ux_risks: Dense grid can become noisy in narrow panels.

components.name: ToastProvider
components.ui_role: Global ephemeral feedback transport and presentation layer.
implementation_notes: Fact: `showToast(message,type,duration)` context used across app.
ui_ux_risks: Stacking and overlap can clash with top overlays at smaller heights.
